name: zaungast-monorepo
description: Monorepo for libzaungast (read-only offline Teams-cache reader) and zaungast (its MCP server). Not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace libzaungast && npm run build --workspace zaungast
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/libzaungast/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/libzaungast-native/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/zaungast/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/unit.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/export-surface.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast-native/test/smoke.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/zaungast/test/unit.ts
scripts.test:fixture: node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/fixture-verify.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/facade.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/zaungast/test/fixture-verify.ts
scripts.test:integration: node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/_inctest.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast/test/_reusetest.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/libzaungast-native/test/reuse.ts && node --conditions=development --experimental-sqlite --import tsx packages/zaungast/test/_fbtest.ts
